title: Auto-Enchant Ultimate - All Items
description: Auto-enchants all tools, weapons & armor (Wood to Netherite) + Trident, Mace & Elytra with max enchantments! (Datapack)
body:
Auto-enchants all tools, weapons & armor (Wood to Netherite) + Trident, Mace & Elytra with max enchantments! (Datapack)

Supports 1.21 - 1.21.9 Java Edition
Supports Neoforge , Forge and Fabric. (Ofc its a datapack)

Note: this is just brand new release so please tell me if theres some bugs or want new updates for this datapack!

You can disable the datapack by typing /datapack disable <datapack name>
you can turn it back on by also typing /datapack enable <datapack name>

Also you will need to wear the armor (Leather to Netherite) first to automatically apply the enchantments.

This datapack enchants Swords (Wood to Netherite) , Bows and Crossbows , Axes , Shovels , Pickaxes and Hoes. Armors (Leather to Netherite) , Elytra , Mace and Trident.

Thank you for downloading! (if you downloaded it lol)
